# Vision GO

> Vision GO is a software studio in Vienna, Austria. We design and build apps and platforms for iOS, Android and the web. Founded 2015. Self-funded, ten employees, five live consumer apps with millions of downloads. We work with clients in fintech, health, mobility and industry.

The Vision GO website (https://visiongo.at) presents the studio's services, portfolio of apps, technical blog, and contact information. It is published in German (de-AT, primary) with an English mirror at /en/. The site uses no analytics, no marketing trackers, and no third-party JavaScript. All hosting is in the EU.

## Core pages

- [Studio (Homepage)](https://visiongo.at/): Studio overview, app portfolio (MegaRadio, ScanUp, eSIMfo, TaxiHub, Online Snake), services and testimonials.
- [Services](https://visiongo.at/leistungen.html): Six disciplines — iOS & Android, Web & SaaS, Cloud & DevOps, AI & ML, Security & GDPR, Product & UX.
- [Work / Projects](https://visiongo.at/projekte.html): Portfolio of in-house apps and client studio work since 2015.
- [About](https://visiongo.at/ueber-uns.html): Studio history, six operating principles, transparent numbers (revenue, project count, headcount), studio photos.
- [Careers](https://visiongo.at/karriere.html): Three open positions, hiring process, salary transparency, four-day-week option.
- [Contact](https://visiongo.at/kontakt.html): Studio address Bäckerstraße 7/7, 1010 Vienna · +43 676 6440122 · info@visiongo.at.
- [Roadmap](https://visiongo.at/roadmap.html): Public product roadmap, kanban-style (In Progress / Planned / Shipped).

## Products

- [MegaRadio](https://visiongo.at/projekte/megaradio.html): 100,000+ live radio stations in one app — FM, AM and Internet. iOS + Android. Website: https://themegaradio.com
- [ScanUp](https://visiongo.at/projekte/scanup.html): Secure document scanner with on-device OCR (Apple Vision). iOS. Website: https://scanup.app
- [eSIMfo](https://visiongo.at/projekte/esimfo.html): Travel eSIM for 200+ countries. iOS + Android. Website: https://esimfo.com
- [TaxiHub](https://visiongo.at/projekte/taxihub.html): Multi-tenant taxi dispatch platform for Vienna. iOS + Android + web console. Website: https://taxihub.at
- [Online Snake](https://visiongo.at/projekte/snake-online.html): Multiplayer snake game with real-money tournaments. iOS + Android + web. Website: https://snakeonline.io

- [EU cloud: Hetzner vs AWS Frankfurt](https://visiongo.at/blog/eu-cloud-hetzner-vs-aws-frankfurt.html)

## Legal

- [Impressum](https://visiongo.at/impressum.html): Austrian legal disclosure (FN 644224p, Handelsgericht Wien, VAT ATU79520014).
- [Datenschutz / Privacy (DE)](https://visiongo.at/datenschutz.html): GDPR privacy policy.
- [AGB / Terms (DE)](https://visiongo.at/agb.html): B2B contract terms.
- [security.txt](https://visiongo.at/.well-known/security.txt): Responsible-disclosure contact (RFC 9116).
- [humans.txt](https://visiongo.at/humans.txt): Team and stack credits.

- [Sitemap (XML)](https://visiongo.at/sitemap.xml): Full URL list with hreflang annotations.
